message:
🌱 Add Kmesh to ADOPTERS.md (#3993)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,3 +12,4 @@ Listed below are organizations that have adopted, or benefitted from, KubeStella
 | SlimToolkit / Mint | Guided install mission for SlimToolkit (now Mint) via KubeStellar Console, with active collaboration from maintainer @kcq in [slimtoolkit/slim#844](https://github.com/slimtoolkit/slim/issues/844) on mission content and recommended install approach | Sandbox | [Mint](https://github.com/mintoolkit/mint) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-slimtoolkit) |
 | PipeCD | Guided install mission for PipeCD via KubeStellar Console, positively received by PipeCD maintainer @zyzzmohit in [pipe-cd/pipecd#6593](https://github.com/pipe-cd/pipecd/issues/6593) | Sandbox | [PipeCD](https://pipecd.dev) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-pipecd) |
 | Harbor | Guided install mission for Harbor via KubeStellar Console, with interest from Harbor community member @Vad1mo in [goharbor/harbor#23006](https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/23006) | Graduated | [Harbor](https://goharbor.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-harbor) |
+| Kmesh | Guided install mission for Kmesh via KubeStellar Console, endorsed by Kmesh community member @yashisrani in [kmesh-net/kmesh#1609](https://github.com/kmesh-net/kmesh/issues/1609) | Sandbox | [Kmesh](https://kmesh.net) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kmesh) |
